name: oicq
description: OICQ (OfCourse I Code the Quintessence): split-pane host for Claude Code and Codex with locked user implementation tasks

scripts.release:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.release:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.release:all: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac zip --arm64 --publish never && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win zip --x64 --publish never

author: Ninokunii
